fmiModelDescription.description: Simulation sink for debugging and recording mission/autopilot telemetry.

ScalarVariable.name: locationXYZ.x_km
ScalarVariable.description: Local navigation frame expressed in kilometers (x=North, y=East, z=Up).

ScalarVariable.name: locationXYZ.y_km
ScalarVariable.description: Local navigation frame expressed in kilometers (x=North, y=East, z=Up).

ScalarVariable.name: locationXYZ.z_km
ScalarVariable.description: Local navigation frame expressed in kilometers (x=North, y=East, z=Up).

ScalarVariable.name: orientation.roll_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Air vehicle orientation expressed as Euler angles in degrees.

ScalarVariable.name: orientation.pitch_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Air vehicle orientation expressed as Euler angles in degrees.

ScalarVariable.name: orientation.yaw_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Air vehicle orientation expressed as Euler angles in degrees.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.stick_pitch_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.stick_roll_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.rudder_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.throttle_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.throttle_aux_norm
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.button_mask
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.hat_x
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.hat_y
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.mode_switch
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: autopilotCmd.reserved
ScalarVariable.description: HOTAS-style control payload shared across control surfaces and mission computer consumers.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.airspeed_mps
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.energy_state_norm
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.angle_of_attack_deg
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.climb_rate
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: flightStatus.health_code
ScalarVariable.description: Mission computer status feedback consumed by autonomy and analysis models.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.waypoint_index
ScalarVariable.description: Waypoint-tracking status produced by the autopilot for logging and requirement evaluation.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.total_waypoints
ScalarVariable.description: Waypoint-tracking status produced by the autopilot for logging and requirement evaluation.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.distance_to_waypoint_km
ScalarVariable.description: Waypoint-tracking status produced by the autopilot for logging and requirement evaluation.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.arrived
ScalarVariable.description: Waypoint-tracking status produced by the autopilot for logging and requirement evaluation.

ScalarVariable.name: missionStatus.complete
ScalarVariable.description: Waypoint-tracking status produced by the autopilot for logging and requirement evaluation.
